description:
Configure the 2025 US Federal Holiday schedule in the Vicidial 'Call Time Holidays' system (User: 6666, Pass: andromeda). Create the following 11 holiday entries with the status set to 'ACTIVE', using the exact Holiday IDs and Dates provided:

| Holiday ID | Holiday Name | Date |
|---|---|---|
| newyears2025 | New Years Day | 2025-01-01 |
| mlk2025 | Martin Luther King Jr Day | 2025-01-20 |
| presidents2025 | Presidents Day | 2025-02-17 |
| memorial2025 | Memorial Day | 2025-05-26 |
| juneteenth2025 | Juneteenth | 2025-06-19 |
| july4th2025 | Independence Day | 2025-07-04 |
| labor2025 | Labor Day | 2025-09-01 |
| columbus2025 | Columbus Day | 2025-10-13 |
| veterans2025 | Veterans Day | 2025-11-11 |
| thanksgiving2025 | Thanksgiving | 2025-11-27 |
| christmas2025 | Christmas Day | 2025-12-25 |
